Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

This patch should have a test case that is doing something useful.  I see sanity.sh test_64c is setting osc.*.cur_grant_bytes=0 but that doesn't test actually do anything without the patch (the cur_grant_bytes doesn't shrink at all).  The test should be enhanced to verify that the actual granted bytes = max_pages_per_rpc * (max_rpcs_in_flight + 1)

commit.subject: LU-8708 osc: depart grant shrinking from pinger
commit.message:
LU-8708 osc: depart grant shrinking from pinger

* Removing grant shrinking code outside of pinger, use a workqueue
  to handle grant shrinking timer.
* Enable OSC grant shrinking by default.

bugzilla: 19507
